NINA.Warnings.Kafka.description: Kafka producer endpoint for NINA BBK CloudEvents on the `nina-bbk` topic keyed by `{warning_id}`.

NINA.Warnings.Mqtt.description: MQTT 5 producer endpoint for NINA BBK CloudEvents using the alert topic hierarchy and retain settings declared in this manifest.

NINA.CivilWarning.name: CivilWarning
NINA.CivilWarning.description: A civil protection warning from Germany's NINA/BBK warning system. Aggregates warnings from MOWAS (federal), KATWARN (municipal), BIWAPP (municipal), DWD (weather service), LHP (flood centers), and police services. Each warning follows the CAP (Common Alerting Protocol) structure with multi-language support.

NINA.Warnings.description: Events from NINA BBK covering German warning areas. Alert and incident records describe the current upstream hazard state and update when the provider changes that state.

NINA.Warnings.mqtt.description: MQTT 5 variant of the NINA BBK events. It carries the same alert semantics as the base events with MQTT topic routing and retain behavior declared per message.

NINA.Warnings.amqp.description: AMQP 1.0 transport variants for nina-bbk. All CloudEvents are published to the nina-bbk address; the subject and application properties mirror the existing Kafka key and MQTT routing axes.

subject.description: AMQP message subject. Mirrors the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key for stable per-entity routing.

state.description: AMQP application property mirroring the state routing axis from the Kafka subject/MQTT topic for broker-side filtering.

severity.description: AMQP application property mirroring the severity routing axis from the Kafka subject/MQTT topic for broker-side filtering.

x-opt-partition-key.description: Service Bus/Event Hubs partition key. Mirrors the CloudEvents subject and Kafka key so events for the same entity route consistently across transports.

NINA.CivilWarning.name: CivilWarning
NINA.CivilWarning.description: A civil protection warning from Germany's NINA/BBK system. Contains CAP-structured alert data with multi-language info blocks, BBK event codes, and German administrative area geocodes (Verwaltungsbereiche).

schema.name: CivilWarning
schema.description: A civil protection warning from Germany's NINA/BBK warning system. Aggregates warnings from MOWAS (federal), KATWARN (municipal), BIWAPP (municipal), DWD (weather service), LHP (flood centers), and police services. Each warning follows the CAP (Common Alerting Protocol) structure with multi-language support.

warning_id.description: The unique warning identifier assigned by the NINA/BBK system (e.g., 'mow.DE-HE-DA-W184-20240723-000').

provider.description: The NINA provider that issued the warning.

descriptions.mowas: Provider value `mowas` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.katwarn: Provider value `katwarn` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.biwapp: Provider value `biwapp` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.dwd: Provider value `dwd` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.lhp: Provider value `lhp` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.police: Provider value `police` for this coded alert field.

version.description: The version number of this warning, incremented with each update.

sender.description: The identifier of the issuing authority (e.g., 'DE-HE-DA-W184').

sender_name.description: The human-readable long name of the issuing authority (e.g., 'Integrierte Leitstelle Stadt Darmstadt').

sent.description: The date and time when the warning was issued, in ISO-8601 format.

descriptions.Actual: Provider value `Actual` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Exercise: Provider value `Exercise` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.System: Provider value `System` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Test: Provider value `Test` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Draft: Provider value `Draft` for this coded alert field.

msg_type.description: The CAP message type indicating the nature of the warning.

descriptions.Alert: Provider value `Alert` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Update: Provider value `Update` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Cancel: Provider value `Cancel` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Ack: Provider value `Ack` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Error: Provider value `Error` for this coded alert field.

scope.description: The CAP scope of the warning. Typically 'Public'.

descriptions.Public: Provider value `Public` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Restricted: Provider value `Restricted` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Private: Provider value `Private` for this coded alert field.

references.description: CAP references to prior related warnings, in the format 'sender,identifier,sent'.

event_code.description: The BBK event code identifying the hazard type (e.g., 'BBK-EVC-067' for animal disease, 'BBK-EVC-045' for flood).

descriptions.Met: Provider value `Met` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Geo: Provider value `Geo` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Safety: Provider value `Safety` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Security: Provider value `Security` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Rescue: Provider value `Rescue` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Fire: Provider value `Fire` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Health: Provider value `Health` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Env: Provider value `Env` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Transport: Provider value `Transport` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Infra: Provider value `Infra` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.CBRNE: Provider value `CBRNE` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Other: Provider value `Other` for this coded alert field.

severity.description: Native CAP severity level (Minor, Moderate, Severe, Extreme, or Unknown). Matches the {severity} MQTT topic axis without further bucketing.

descriptions.Extreme: Provider value `Extreme` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Severe: Provider value `Severe` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Moderate: Provider value `Moderate` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Minor: Provider value `Minor` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Unknown: Provider value `Unknown` for this coded alert field.

descriptions.Immediate: Provider value `Immediate` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Expected: Provider value `Expected` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Future: Provider value `Future` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Past: Provider value `Past` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Unknown: Provider value `Unknown` for this coded alert field.

descriptions.Observed: Provider value `Observed` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Likely: Provider value `Likely` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Possible: Provider value `Possible` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Unlikely: Provider value `Unlikely` for this coded alert field.
descriptions.Unknown: Provider value `Unknown` for this coded alert field.

headline.description: A brief human-readable headline summarizing the warning.

description.description: A detailed description of the warning situation.

instruction.description: Recommended protective actions for the public.

web.description: A URL to further information about the warning.

contact.description: Contact information for the issuing authority.

area_desc.description: A textual description of the affected geographic area.

verwaltungsbereiche.description: Comma-separated German administrative area codes (Amtliche Gemeindeschlüssel) affected by the warning.

language.description: The language of the info block used to populate this event (e.g., 'de', 'EN').

state.description: German federal-state slug derived from CAP area administrative codes (warnVerwaltungsbereiche), with sender-code fallback. Matches the {state} MQTT topic axis.

description: NINA BBK publishes civil-protection warnings from Germany's Federal Office of Civil Protection and Disaster Assistance (BBK) for German warning areas. These events help consumers monitor hazards, route notifications, and correlate public-warning updates without polling the upstream source directly.

documentation.description: Source documentation for NINA BBK, including upstream feed context and bridge deployment notes.
